flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwest Florida State College rose 70% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.7k → $7.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Florida State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwest Florida State College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $2.6k).
